response.overview: Two friends, Faris and Lokman, aspire to become successful entrepreneurs. Faris, a web designer, creates an application with potential for development. They seek investors and business partners to develop the application. Another friend of theirs, Dr. Haziq, introduces Ridwan, an entrepreneur who appears impressive, but is actually burdened with debt. Faris, Lokman, Haziq and Ridwan join together to create a business opportunity in the manner of 'Multi Level Marketing'.
response.title: Kes Seksyen 420
